Option D: "mean giwls" – The second part of the title, "Girls," is written as "giwls". So instead of G-I-R-L-S, it's G-I-W-L-S. That looks like the R was replaced with a W. This type of typo could be considered humorous because it's a common keyboard-related mistake. Now, thinking about which of these is a more common humorous edit.
